name: Chat Used!
query:
SELECT
    r.trace_id,

    'https://logfire-us.pydantic.dev/espo412/portfolio'
        || '?q=trace_id%3D%27' || r.trace_id || '%27'
        AS trace_url,

    attributes->>'endpoint'      AS endpoint,
    attributes->>'message_text'  AS message_text

FROM records AS r
WHERE (attributes->>'slack_alert')::BOOLEAN = TRUE
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
